All anchors verified accurate. Confirming no code was modified.
Everything verifies. Summary:

- **Deliverable exists**: `extensions/foreman/docs/INTERNALS.md` created with all 8 required scope areas (module map, control flow, crew seams, context flow, escalation, gate pipeline/DoD, recipes, NEVER boundaries).
- **Format met**: stable `## NN -` machine-scannable headers, "Start here" section, "NEVER boundaries" section, top note splitting INTERNALS/CHARTER/AGENTS concerns, file:line + function-name anchors throughout.
- **Accuracy verified**: spot-checked ~30 anchors against real code — `runAgent`/`runAgentWithTimeout` (236/422), `--append-system-prompt` (258), round loop `while (state.round < state.maxRounds)` (1582), `formatIntentContract` (planner.ts:348), gate kinds/stages (gates.ts:13-14), `runCommandGates` all-zero rule (228), `AGENT_TIMEOUTS` defaults (54-60), `extractJsonBlock` prose tolerance (486), wholesale devContext rebuild (2106-2110), ground-truth exit code (1814-1818). All correct.
- **Constraints respected**: index.ts/planner.ts/gates.ts unchanged; only a one-line CHARTER.md "Docs structure" pointer added (fits naturally); AGENTS.md untouched.
- **Gates passed** (exit 0); doc-only change leaves the headless suite unaffected.

Minor nit: in §03 one anchor (`index.ts:1727`) is labeled both "command gates" (correct) and "emits the decision prompt" (the latter is slightly imprecise), but this is cosmetic and does not undermine accuracy or usefulness.

VERDICT: PASS
